profile.description: Bias the next Herbalisti curated-selector pass toward book-scale practical remedies, direct hygiene references, materia-medica manuals, repertories, vade-mecums, family physicians, and botanical-principles books while cooling thin almanac, receipt-book, guide-to-health, sensational, occult, veterinary, lecture, and administrative shapes.

titleScoreAdjustments.phrase: description of disease and its treatment
adapted to domestic and professional use
companion to the latest edition of the british pharmacopoeia

notes: Use this after the 2026-06-21 uncovered pass showed that direct hygiene and materia-medica books still land well, while almanac and guide-to-health shapes can still collapse into thin reference witnesses.
The intent is to preserve the anti-noise brakes from the earlier practical-remedies profile while pushing thin almanac, receipt-book, and housekeeping drift lower in the next selector pass.
